desc: A scientist invents a time-travelling gadget that draws him into a bitter battle.

title: Bahubali 2: The Conclusion
desc: Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat Bhallaladeva, for killing his father.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
desc: While rescuing an enslaved princess, a young man discovers his true identity.

title: Prema Khaidi
desc: Chandram and Neelima, a young couple, face troubles since her father, Bapineedu, does not approve of her choice as he belongs to a poor family.

title: Chandralekha
desc: An unemployed man saves a rich woman and takes her to the hospital where her relatives mistake him as her husband. He plays along as he needs money to repay a loan.

title: Dhurandar
desc: The presenter discusses the film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' in terms of its OTT and television release and also talks about its teaser.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Software Sudheer
desc: Chandu, a young software engineer, falls for Swathi, a beautiful woman. However, they face many challenges in their relationship and must overcome them all.

title: Badrinath
desc: Badri is the protector of Badrinath temple. However, when a woman falls in love with him, his guru decides against making Badri his successor.

title: Julayi
desc: When Ravi unknowingly thwarts Bittu's bank heist, he becomes the target of Bittu's wrath. Susbequently, Ravi is forced to fight to protect his loved ones from the ruthless criminal.

title: Yevadu
desc: Satya gets a different face after he is almost killed, but a new face multiplies his problems. His ordeal begins when he leaves the hospital and has to deal with his lover's murderer.

title: S/O Satyamurthy
desc: Anand faces several challenges as he attempts to save his father's wealth while trying to handle the responsibility of earning a livelihood for his family.

title: Parugu
desc: A rich and powerful Neelakanta's perception about love marriage changes when both his daughters, Subbalakshmi and Meenakshi, fall in love.
